negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: physics_032
prompt: A close-up shot captures a wooden table surface where a bright green sheet of paper lies flat. Two black and blue gripping tools are positioned at each end of the paper, their handles extending off-frame. The tools apply pressure, pulling the paper taut. As the video progresses, the tools gradually increase the tension, forming a visible crease down the middle of the paper. The paper begins to tear, separating cleanly into two equal halves. By the final frame, the paper is fully torn, with one half lying to the left and the other to the right of the original position, both resting on the wooden surface.
